scan.comment: Recent pump.fun txs to pull from RPC per scout run — watch Alchemy CU/s.

watch.comment: transport poll = HTTP getSignaturesForAddress (Alchemy OK). websocket = logsSubscribe (banyak provider tidak support). pollIntervalMs = seberapa sering cek tx baru ke program pump.

whaleSignal.comment: Bonding-curve buy size (SOL notional) to treat as whale interest — minimal ~5 SOL.

networkCongestion.comment: If latest-window median priority fee exceeds this, count 1 red flag. Wire your daemon to real metrics.

holderFreshFunding.comment: Heavy on RPC; keep false until indexer or sampled funding-age fetch exists.

topHolderBalanceSol.comment: Weak heuristic; easy to game. Prefer later: concentration % from an API.

marketCapEntry.comment: Daemon uses virtual reserve drawdown vs global initial (ratio) + bonding curve complete. skipIfEstimatedMcSolAbove reserved for future MC/SOL proxy; ratio uses skipIfPriceMultipleFromInferredLaunchGte.

walletDumper.comment: solscanTokenCreatorCheck: jika true dan SOLSCAN_API_KEY di daemon/.env, skip jika buyer = Creator token (Solscan Pro token/meta). Tanpa key, langkah ini dilewati. Lalu blacklist + pola sell RPC.

execution.comment: log_only = radar saja. paper = simulasi (quote + saldo virtual + win rate di state.paper). execute = swap nyata (TRADING_WALLET_SECRET). Never put keys in this file.

walletIntelligence.comment: Pacing fields reduce Alchemy 429 / CU burst. fetchPerWallet: lower maxWalletsToClassify + perWalletSignatures + maxDecode. On 429, wallet intel pauses ~rateLimitCooldownMs. Set pause* to 0 to disable delays (higher 429 risk).

whaleFollow.comment: Legacy partial: once when full quote > entry (recoverModalMinGainPct 0). Pull recoverModalPctOfEntrySol% of entry SOL; remainder uses remainderTakeProfitPct vs post-partial quote baseline + trailing. staleChartExitMs 0 = off.
